title: Ubiquiti UISP-FIBER-XGS, UISP Fiber XGS-PON ONU
description: UISP-FIBER-XGS is a CPE ONU unit for XGS/XG-PON solutions, with which you can upgrade your network to 10Gbit. The device itself serves to convert GPON to LAN and only supports Bridge mode, not Router mode. For connection to the XGS/XG-PON network, it uses 1x SC connector with APC polishing and a maximum speed of 9.95 Gb/s downstream and 9.95 Gb/s upstream. The TX range is from 4 to 9 dBm and RX sensitivity from -9 to -26 dBm. It is powered by a 5V/3A USB-C adapter Unit 5V/3A USB-C power adapter Holder and mounting kit
specsSearch: Optics Transmission speed 9,95 / 9,95 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1270 / 1577 Distance [km] 20 Transfer type XGS-PON Polishing type APC Tx power [dBm] 4 up to 9 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 9 up to -26 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC LAN speed (1) 100M/1G/2.5G/5G/10G Power Max. power consumption [W] 8 Power via connector/terminal 5V DC
